## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Task Reference

Closes #issue or Implements T{version}-{task}

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test addition/update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] ROADMAP.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (or `npm run changelog`)
- [ ] Commit message follows conventional commits

## Testing

How was this tested?

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.
